title: Recruitment for Higher Executive Officer in the Director Support Office
body: "We have a vacancy for a Higher Executive Officer in the Director Support Office.  Job Title  Higher Executive Officer in the Director Support Office  Grade  HEO  Salary & Pension  £37,480 per annum with Pension Scheme  Annual Leave entitlement  Commencing at 25 days  Role  You will provide full professional office support services to the VMD’s senior team and manage the Director’s Support Team. Your leadership will be key in providing an efficient work environment and ensuring the team’s objectives are achieved.  How to apply  You must make your application via Higher Executive Officer in the Director Support Office - Civil Service Jobs - GOV.UK where you will find a full job description.  Closing Date  17 February 2025 "
